name: Copper
description: Copper is a CRM designed for Google Workspace. Manage people, companies, opportunities, and activities with deep Gmail and Google Calendar integration for relationship-driven sales teams.

capabilities.name: search_people
capabilities.description: Search for people (contacts) by name, email, or custom fields.

capabilities.name: create_person
capabilities.description: Create a new person (contact) record with name, email, and company.

capabilities.name: list_opportunities
capabilities.description: List and filter sales opportunities by pipeline and status.

capabilities.name: create_opportunity
capabilities.description: Create a new sales opportunity with value and pipeline stage.

capabilities.name: log_activity
capabilities.description: Log an activity (note, call, or meeting) on a person or opportunity.
